sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: Stat cards with project counts, activity chart, activity feed, project health indicators

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Grid/list toggle, search bar, sort dropdown, 6 project cards with name/status/date

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Split pane with file tree left, document editor right, breadcrumbs

sections.name: Kanban Board
sections.description: 4 columns (Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done) with 12 draggable cards

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Canvas with toolbar (select, draw, text, shape), sticky notes, zoom controls

sections.name: Schema Planner
sections.description: 4 entity boxes (User, Project, Idea, Task) with relationship lines

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Expandable nested folder/file structure with path breadcrumb

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: Capture input, 8 idea cards with tags/priority/linked project

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Message thread with 6 messages, typing indicator, send input

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: 4 tabs (Profile, Billing, Preferences, Integrations) with forms and toggles
